name: Rhubarb Chutney (Prodigy)
recipeIngredient: 1 Jalapeno chile, seeds and veins removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the rhubarb and slice into pieces that are 1/4-inch thick.
If the stalks are wide, cut them in halves or thirds lengthwise first.
2. Finely chop the grated ginger with the garlic and chile.
3. Place all ingredients in a non-corrosive pan.
4. Bring to a boil, then lower the heat and simmer until the rhubarb is broken down
and has the texture of jam, about 30 minutes.
5. Store refrigerated in a glass jar.
Makes 1 Cup
Deborah Madison - Prodigy Guest Chefs Cookbook
